applets.name: Resale Engine
applets.description: An automated inventory tracker and resale listing assistant that uses AI for grouping, deduplicating, and pricing items.

applets.name: The Well Lived Citizen: Brand Engine
applets.description: The structural database and intelligence suite for The Well Lived Citizen. Manages brand logic, pricing, market intelligence, and developer handoff directives.

applets.name: ResellFlow AI
applets.description: A professional inventory tracker for resellers featuring AI-powered image analysis, market price search, and automated listing descriptions.

applets.name: ResaleAI Engine
applets.description: An expert resale appraisal app that scans photos, determines market value, and generates optimized listings for Poshmark, eBay, and Chairish using Gemini 3 Pro with reasoning.

applets.name: ShipWeight Estimator
applets.description: Estimate item weights and shipping costs for eBay, Poshmark, and more using AI, without needing a scale.
